name: Annie's Sherry Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. For the bottom layer, melt baking chocolate and margarine together in a bowl.
3. Add eggs, sugar, flour, salt, and vanilla. Mix well until smooth.
4. Pour the mixture into a jelly roll pan lined with parchment paper.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until set.
6. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
7. For the filling, cream butter and powdered sugar in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
8. Gradually add half-and-half and sherry, mixing well after each addition.
9. Once the mixture is smooth and fluffy, spread it evenly over the cooled bottom layer.
10. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow the filling to set.
11. For the topping, melt chocolate chips with a bit of half-and-half and butter in a microwave or saucepan until smooth.
12. Spread the melted chocolate mixture evenly over the chilled filling.
13. Allow the bars to chill in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour before serving.
14. Cut into squares using a sharp knife. Serve and enjoy!
